description: Critical Agent Boundary Violation: qa-agent modified src/components/layout/Header.tsx and DashboardClient.tsx, violating the directory ownership rules defined in GEMINI.md. This resulted in a ReferenceError ('WhatsNewBadge is not defined') being introduced into the production build because the agent omitted necessary imports and bypassed automated validation by claiming 'manual verification' success.
suggestion: Strengthen routing logic to prevent qa-agent from having write access to src/ components outside of __tests__. Update AGENTS.md to explicitly forbid qa-agent from 'fixing' implementation gaps; any missing integration or data-testid must be assigned back to dev-agent.
